title: Privileged Group Modification
description: Detects modification of privileged groups (Domain/Enterprise/Schema Admins, Administrators) via 4728/4732/4756.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT sourceip, username, QIDNAME(qid) AS EventName FROM events WHERE (UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4728%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4732%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4756%') AND (UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%Domain Admins%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%Enterprise Admins%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%Administrators%') ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 15 MINUTES
